docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WINTON HOTEL, LLC DBA WINTON HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-13-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PROOF OF SEVICE WAS DEFECTIVE; PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS REPRESENTED BY HARI BASNYET - MANAGER.
